entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Gaiste choitianta a thugann rabhadh faoi bhotún dóchúil.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Cúl gairid a chríochnaíonn an smaoineamh.

entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Bíonn leabharlann cúrsaí is láidre nuair a mheaitseálann an cuardach scil, ábhar, nó caighdeán aitheanta.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Eolaire inchraolta de gach pointe iontrála comhrá foghlama d’aíonna.

entries.source: A crawlable guide library for AI tutoring, study skills, prompt loops, active recall, public learning modes, and practical AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: Leabharlann treoracha inchraolta le haghaidh teagasc IS, scileanna staidéir, lúba pras, cuimhne ghníomhach, modhanna foghlama poiblí, agus foghlaim phraiticiúil le cabhair IS.

entries.source: A crawlable map of AI learning workflows that connects public guest modes, prompt starters, learning paths, and practical guides.
entries.value: Mapa inchraolta de shreafaí oibre foghlama IS a cheanglaíonn modhanna poiblí d’aíonna, prasaí tosaithe, conairí foghlama, agus treoracha praiticiúla.

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: léirmheastóir;

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Is féidir le míniú díreach a bheith úsáideach. Ach uaireanta is é an bealach is fearr le smaoineamh a thuiscint dul i ngleic leis.

entries.source: A focused collection of inspir guides about {value1}, with prompts, study workflows, and related public learning modes.
entries.value: Bailiúchán dírithe de threoracha inspir faoi {value1}, le prasaí, sreafaí oibre staidéir, agus modhanna foghlama poiblí gaolmhara.

entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Compánach foghlama IS saor in aisce do dhaoine atá á múineadh féin.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Teagascóir IS saor in aisce do dhaltaí ar mian leo tuiscint, ní cóipeáil.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Compánach foghlama IS poiblí saor in aisce le haghaidh teagaisc, cleachtaidh, tráth na gceist, luaschártaí, díospóireachta, aiseolais scríbhneoireachta, cabhrach códaithe, agus pleanála staidéir.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: Sraith teagascóra IS saor-rochtana ar féidir léi oiriúnú do d’institiúid.

entries.source: A generic answer can make a worksheet look finished while leaving the misconception untouched. The math route links hints, step checks, Socratic questions, quizzes, and flashcards into one learning loop.
entries.value: Is féidir le freagra cineálach cuma chríochnaithe a chur ar bhileog oibre agus an mhíthuiscint a fhágáil gan teagmháil. Nascann bealach na matamaitice leideanna, seiceálacha céime, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, tráthanna ceiste, agus spléachchártaí in aon lúb foghlama amháin.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Ba chóir do shreabhadh oibre maith IS don teaghlach an foghlaimeoir a dhéanamh níos neamhspleáiche, ní níos spleáiche. Is féidir le tuismitheoirí leathanaigh phoiblí a úsáid chun a fheiceáil cad atá gach mód ceaptha a dhéanamh sula dtosaíonn páiste.

entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Tá lúb ag seisiún maith foghlama

entries.source: A good path does not end at the answer. It ends with a test, a correction, and a next repetition.
entries.value: Ní chríochnaíonn conair mhaith ag an bhfreagra. Críochnaíonn sí le tástáil, le ceartúchán, agus leis an gcéad athrá eile.

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Seomra réasúnaíochta treoraithe le haghaidh ceistiú disciplínithe

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Leid a chabhraíonn gan gach rud a thabhairt uaidh.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Rogha eile ar Khan Academy do chuimhneacháin bheo foghlama IS.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Bonn foghlaimeoirí atá ag síneadh cheana féin thar an India chuig lucht féachana idirnáisiúnta níos leithne.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Is féidir le foghlaimeoir Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, tráthanna ceiste, nó spléachchártaí a oscailt go díreach i mód aoi ón eolaire modhanna foghlama poiblí.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: De ghnáth bíonn ceann de thrí rud de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoir atá ag roghnú idir uirlisí: curaclam struchtúrtha, teagascóir beo don phointe ina bhfuil sé greamaithe, nó lúb chleachtaidh a fhágann go bhfanann an smaoineamh foghlamtha.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Is minic a bhogann foghlaimeoir trí fhíseáin ullmhaithe, ailt, cleachtaí, agus deais.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Tosaíonn foghlaimeoir laistigh de chomhrá atá sonrach don mhód agus is féidir leis samhail níos simplí, ceist níos deacra, tráth ceiste, deic spléachchártaí, nó léirmheas a iarraidh.

entries.source: A learning community begins
entries.value: Tosaíonn pobal foghlama

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: staraí nua-aimseartha;

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Treoir chairdiúil do thuismitheoirí ar mhodhanna foghlama IS poiblí inspir le haghaidh leideanna obair bhaile, míniú, gnáthaimh staidéir, spléachchártaí, agus comhráite foghlama níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A personal tutor should not be limited by geography or income.
entries.value: Níor chóir do theagascóir pearsanta a bheith teoranta ag tíreolaíocht ná ag ioncam.

entries.source: A plain-language mental model, sharper questions, and review cards that make the idea easier to remember.
entries.value: Samhail mheabhrach i ngnáthchaint, ceisteanna níos géire, agus cártaí athbhreithnithe a dhéanann an smaoineamh níos éasca le cuimhneamh.

entries.source: A plan that fits real life, quizzes that reveal weak areas, and review material built from errors.
entries.value: Plean a oireann don saol fíor, tráthanna ceiste a nochtann réimsí laga, agus ábhar athbhreithnithe tógtha ó earráidí.

entries.source: A practical AI learning path for moving from confusion to clear explanation, Socratic questions, examples, and active recall.
entries.value: Conair phraiticiúil foghlama IS chun bogadh ó mhearbhall go míniú soiléir, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, samplaí, agus aisghairm ghníomhach.

entries.source: A public AI learning prompt library with starter prompts for tutoring, homework help, Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, exam prep, and more.
entries.value: Leabharlann phoiblí prasanna foghlama IS le prasaí tosaithe le haghaidh teagaisc, cabhair obair bhaile, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, ullmhúchán scrúduithe, agus tuilleadh.

entries.source: A realistic study routine, a smaller habit, and a reflective loop that catches drift early.
entries.value: Gnáthamh staidéir réalaíoch, nós níos lú, agus lúb mhachnamhach a aimsíonn imeacht ón gcosán go luath.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: Rogha athbhreithnithe ionas go bhfillfidh cártaí caillte níos luaithe.

entries.source: A richer context, sharper questions, stronger counterarguments, and clearer evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Comhthéacs níos saibhre, ceisteanna níos géire, frithargóintí níos láidre, agus teorainneacha fianaise níos soiléire.

entries.source: A smaller next step, a clearer mistake explanation, and a final answer the learner can actually defend.
entries.value: Céad chéim níos lú, míniú botúin níos soiléire, agus freagra deiridh is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir a chosaint i ndáiríre.

entries.source: A Socratic tutor can surface those gaps without turning the session into a lecture.
entries.value: Is féidir le teagascóir Sócraiteach na bearnaí sin a thabhairt chun solais gan an seisiún a iompú ina léacht.

entries.source: A strong session usually has four stages.
entries.value: Bíonn ceithre chéim ag seisiún láidir de ghnáth.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Is minic a chuardaíonn dalta, tuismitheoir, múinteoir, agus foghlaimeoir féin-mhúinte an teagascóir IS céanna i dteanga éagsúil. Déanann leathanaigh ar leith na cásanna úsáide cearta agus na teorainneacha sábháilteachta níos soiléire.

entries.source: A temporary loading state for inspir.
entries.value: Staid lódála shealadach do inspir.

entries.source: A tutor for the first question
entries.value: Teagascóir don chéad cheist

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Iarrann cárta úsáideach rud amháin. Níor chóir dó cúig cheist a cheilt taobh istigh d’aon phras amháin. Ba chóir dó a bheith sách sonrach le freagairt, ach gan a bheith chomh cúng sin go n-éiríonn sé gan bhrí.

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Ba chóir dhá shraith a bheith ag freagra stairiúil úsáideach ó IS.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Deir spléachchárta lag IS:

entries.source: A weak prompt only names a topic. A strong prompt names the topic, the level, the sticking point, and the kind of help you want. Use this {value1} as the context, then ask the mode to make you do something with it.
entries.value: Ní ainmníonn pras lag ach ábhar. Ainmníonn pras láidir an t-ábhar, an leibhéal, an pointe greamaithe, agus an cineál cabhrach atá uait. Úsáid an {value1} seo mar chomhthéacs, ansin iarr ar an mód rud éigin a dhéanamh leat leis.

entries.source: A working next move, a clearer bug or concept, and a project path that teaches through doing.
entries.value: An chéad bheart eile atá inoibrithe, fabht nó coincheap níos soiléire, agus conair tionscadail a mhúineann trí dhéanamh.

entries.source: According to CalOPPA we agree to the following:Users can visit our site anonymously; our Privacy Policy link includes the word “Privacy”, and can easily be found on the home page of our website; Users will be notified of any privacy policy changes on our Privacy Policy Page; Users are able to change their personal information by emailing us at support@inspir.app
entries.value: De réir CalOPPA aontaímid leis an méid seo a leanas: is féidir le húsáideoirí cuairt a thabhairt ar ár suíomh gan ainm; cuimsíonn nasc ár bPolasaí Príobháideachais an focal “Privacy”, agus is furasta é a aimsiú ar leathanach baile ár suíomh gréasáin; cuirfear úsáideoirí ar an eolas faoi aon athruithe ar an bpolasaí príobháideachais ar ár Leathanach Polasaí Príobháideachais; is féidir le húsáideoirí a gcuid faisnéise pearsanta a athrú trí ríomhphost a chur chugainn ag support@inspir.app

entries.value: Ina theannta sin, aontaíonn tú gan:

entries.source: After each hint, explain why the step works before continuing.
entries.value: Tar éis gach leid, mínigh cén fáth a n-oibríonn an chéim sula leanann tú ar aghaidh.

entries.source: After every learner answer, identify the claim, reasoning, assumptions, gaps, contradictions, or corrected insight. Give one brief read of their answer, update the reasoning map with concise labels, then ask exactly one next-best question.
entries.value: Tar éis gach freagra ón bhfoghlaimeoir, sainaithin an maíomh, an réasúnaíocht, na toimhdí, na bearnaí, na contrárthachtaí, nó an léargas ceartaithe. Tabhair léamh gairid amháin ar a bhfreagra, nuashonraigh an mapa réasúnaíochta le lipéid ghonta, ansin cuir go díreach aon cheist amháin eile is fearr.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.

entries.value: Tar éis na hinsamhlaithe, déan achoimre ar an suíomh, na srianta, agus an fhianaise.

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: Is féidir le IS cabhrú spléachchártaí a dhéanamh níos tapúla, ach tagann an fhoghlaim fós ón aisghabháil. Má scríobhann an uirlis na cártaí agus mura mbíonn ar an bhfoghlaimeoir streachailt riamh chun iad a fhreagairt, ní athraíonn beagnach tada. Tiontaíonn an leagan úsáideach nótaí míshlachtmhara ina bprasaí dírithe, ansin cuireann sé ar an bhfoghlaimeoir cuimhneamh sula nochtar an freagra.

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: Is féidir le IS cabhrú leat foghlaim níos tapúla. Is féidir leis cabhrú leat foghlaim a sheachaint go hiomlán freisin.

entries.source: AI can make one-to-one learning dramatically more available.
entries.value: Is féidir le IS foghlaim duine le duine a dhéanamh i bhfad níos fáilte.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: Is féidir le IS nótaí garbha a iompú ina bprasaí aisghabhála níos glaine. Is féidir leis smaointe leathana a roinnt ina gcártaí níos lú, samplaí a chur leis, agus gaistí a d’fhéadfadh foghlaimeoir a chailleadh a aithint.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Cóitseálaí Díospóireachta IS le hArgóintí Níos Géire chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: roghnaigh ábhar ar bith agus tabhair aghaidh ar dhíospóireacht cheart. Roghnaigh taobh, glac dúshlán, agus foghlaim argóintí níos fearr a dhéanamh.
